ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock is currently active or delisted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_stock_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("stock_exchange") REFERENCES market_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's official website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone in which the stock exchange operates */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the stock exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the price data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the trading volume compared to the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid per share */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the company records shareholders eligible for the dividend */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock starts trading without the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the split was executed */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of the split (e.g., 2:1, 3:1) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the company records shareholders eligible for the split */,
  "ex_split_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock starts trading with the split */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the split is officially effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the access request in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the query was performed */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., success, failed, running) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in milliseconds */,
  "result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query result in bytes */,
  "is_cached" INTEGER /* Indicates if the query result was served from cache */,
  "query_plan" TEXT /* Execution plan of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the stock price */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  "predicted_change_percent" REAL /* Predicted percentage change in the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume spike) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., system, user-defined) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active in minutes */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "is_email_notified" INTEGER /* Indicates if an email notification was sent for the alert */,
  "is_sms_notified" INTEGER /* Indicates if an SMS notification was sent for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
